about.label: About
about.heading: The Strategist
about.name: Niraj Khadse
bio: Strategy and transformation professional with a proven record of delivering $24.2M+ in business impact through competitive intelligence, sourcing optimization, and strategic product development.

Experienced in advising senior executives, optimizing product portfolios, and driving cost and operational efficiencies in global markets. Skilled in leading cross-functional teams, facilitating executive workshops, and aligning strategies with market realities.
about.philosophyQuote: Aligning competitive intelligence and engineering insight with market realities — turning strategy into measurable, multi-million-dollar business impact.

items.title: Constellation of the Quarter

items.title: Stellar of the Year

items.title: Star Award · 3×

items.title: Constellation Award · 2×
